response.step_by_step_log: I reviewed the entire video duration from 00:00 to 04:55. The video consists of static images featuring fan messages and art, followed by a segment from 04:32 onwards featuring the Hololive 3rd Generation performers on stage. The audio throughout the video consists of instrumental background music and spoken dialogue from the performers. No vocal music was detected in this clip, therefore no lyric searches were performed.
response.global_summary: The video is a compilation of static images displaying fan messages and illustrations for the Hololive 3rd Generation 3rd Live concert, followed by a short clip of the performers on stage announcing the start of the show. There is no vocal music performed throughout this segment.

scenes.description: Compilation of static images with text messages from fans for the Hololive 3rd Gen concert, followed by a video clip of the performers on stage introducing the start of the event.
